pvi-desc: Waxay ku darsataa macluumaadka booqashooyinka bogga falka macluumaad.
pvi-month-count: Booqashooyinka bogga ee 30 ka maalmood ee la soo dhaafay
pvi-cached-error: Isku day hore oo xogtan lagu soo helayay wuu fashilmay. Si loo yareeyo culayska server-ka, dib isku dayga waa la xannibay muddo $1 ah.
